description: Initial version of prompts for agents

prompts.name: handwritten_notes_prompt
prompts.description: To generate the beautiful handwritten notes for the user query
prompts.steps: First use the `handwritten_notes_template_planner` template to understand the user query and generate structured notes. Then use the `handwritten_notes_template_image_generator` template to convert the structured notes into visually appealing handwritten notes.

templates.name: handwritten_notes_template_planner
templates.description: to understand the user query and generate structured notes
templates.template: identify and explain $topic. Be specific and to the point. Provide relevant examples. Audience is $audience

variables.name: topic
variables.description: The specific topic or subject that the user query is about. This should be a concise phrase that captures the main focus of the query.

variables.name: audience
variables.description: The intended audience for the sketchnote. This could be a specific group of people such as 'software engineers', 'data scientists', 'business analysts', etc., and will help tailor the content and style of the notes.

templates.name: handwritten_notes_template_image_generator
templates.description: to convert the structured notes into visually appealing handwritten notes
templates.template: Create a hand-drawn sketchnote visual summary of these notes. Use a pristine white paper background (no lines). The art style should be `graphic recording' or 'visual thinking' using black ink fine-liners for clear outlines and text. Use colored markers (specifically teal, orange, and muted red) for simple shading and accents. Center the main title in a 3D-style rectangular box. Surround the title with radially distributed simple doodles, business icons, stick figures, and graphs: that explain the concepts. Use arrows to connect ideas. The text should be distinct, handwritten, all-caps printing, legible and organized like a professional brainstorming session. $resolution

variables.name: resolution
variables.description: to specify the image resolution for the generated sketchnote. This could be in the format of '800x600 pixels', '1024x768 pixels', etc., depending on the desired level of detail and clarity for the handwritten notes.

prompts.name: object_technical_description_prompt
prompts.description: To generate an image of technical description of an object based on its attributes and characteristics
prompts.steps: Use the `object_technical_description_template` template to create a detailed technical infographic of the specified object, incorporating various annotations, labels, and visual elements to effectively communicate its technical details.

templates.name: object_technical_description_template
templates.description: to describe the technical details of an object based on its attributes and characteristics
templates.template:
Create a technical infographic of $object with a 45-degree isometric 3D perspective showing the device slightly tilted to reveal depth and dimension.
Combine a realistic photoreal render with black ink technical annotations on a pure white background. Include:
A) Key component labels with color-coded callout boxes. Do not repeat a label more than once.
B) Internal component visibility through transparent/cutaway sections.
C) Measurements, dimensions, and precise scale markers.
D) Material callouts and quantities.
E) Color-coded arrows for function/flow: RED (power/battery), BLUE (data/connectivity), ORANGE (thermal/processor), GREEN (sensors/haptics).
F) Simple schematics or cross-sectional diagrams where relevant.

Place $object] title in a hand-drawn technical box (top-left corner).

Style: Black linework (technical pen/architectural), sketched but precise. Object remains clearly visible. Educational museum-exhibit vibe. Clean composition, balanced negative space. Perspective: Isometric 3D angle—tilted to show depth, dimension, and internal architecture dramatically. Like a professional product teardown or engineering manual. Colors: ~10-15% accent density. Black dominant. White background. Output: $resolution, ultra-crisp, social-feed optimized.

variables.name: object
variables.description: Specify the object for which the technical description is to be generated. This could be any physical device, machine, or piece of technology such as 'smartphone', 'laptop', 'car engine', 'drone', etc. The more specific the object, the more detailed and accurate the technical description can be.

variables.name: resolution
variables.description: to specify the image resolution for the generated technical infographic. This could be in the format of '800x600 pixels', '1024x768 pixels', etc., depending on the desired level of detail and clarity for the technical description.

prompts.name: Image To Sketch Prompt
prompts.description: To convert a given image into a simple line drawing or sketch that captures the essential contours and features of the original image.
prompts.steps: Use the `image_to_sketch_template` template to analyze the input image and generate a clean, minimalist line drawing that emphasizes the key shapes and outlines while removing color and shading details.

templates.name: image_to_sketch_template
templates.description: to convert an image into a line drawing or sketch
templates.template: Create a photo-style line drawing ink sketch of the faces identical to the uploaded reference image - keep every facial feature, proportion, and expression exactly the same. Use blue and white ink tones with intricate, fine line detailing, drawn on a notebook-page style background. Show a right hand holding a pen and an eraser near the sketch, as if the artist is still working.

prompts.name: Old Photo Restoration Prompt
prompts.description: To restore and enhance old, damaged photographs by repairing tears, removing stains, and colorizing black-and-white images while preserving the original details and character of the photo.
prompts.steps: Use the `old_photo_restoration_template` template to analyze the input photograph, identify areas of damage or degradation, and apply appropriate restoration techniques to produce a revitalized version

templates.name: old_photo_restoration_template
templates.description: to restore and enhance old photographs
templates.template:
Edit this photo into a professional portrait of very high quality and Color, comparable to the results of Canon EOS R5. Create like a recent photo, with great clarity and no noise. Produce razor-sharp photos. Full 4k
My thoughts: The clarity and color grading feels very modern. It handled the noise reduction quite well without making the skin look too "waxy."
